tasks.prompt: Replace RoutingDecision.expectedBenefit's numeric contract with the frozen enum none | low | medium | high. Preserve routing semantics with none for bypass, kill-switch, force-bypass, and fail-open decisions; medium for Stage 0 activation; high for Stage 1 indexed activation; and reserve low without inventing a weak-activation class. Update focused tests and public types needed by this change without unrelated refactoring.
